- checkpoint: completed
- resumed_from: 无
- current_run_alerts: apply_execute=needs-attention, final=needs-attention
- current_run_priority_artifact: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-current-apply-attention/APPLY-RESULT.json [apply-result]

- lineage.is_resumed_run: False
- lineage.source_run_id: 无
- lineage.source_checkpoint: 无
- lineage.source_resumed_from: 无
- lineage.resume_strategy: inspect-after-apply-attention
- lineage.resume_strategy_reason: source apply recovery marked resume as not recommended
[doctor] lineage 摘要
- 这不是 resumed run；当前运行没有接续历史 run 的 lineage。
[doctor] 当前 run 异常摘要
- 当前 run 存在异常状态：apply_execute=needs-attention, final=needs-attention
- 优先查看产物：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-current-apply-attention/APPLY-RESULT.json [apply-result]
- 说明：最近异常出在 apply 阶段，建议先看 apply 结果/计划文件。
[doctor] 状态
- apply_execute: needs-attention
- repair:
- rollback:
- final: needs-attention
[doctor] apply result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-current-apply-attention/APPLY-RESULT.json
- mode: execute
- final_status: needs-attention
- nginx_test.requested: True
- nginx_test.status: failed
- recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- recovery.resume_strategy: manual-recovery-first
- recovery.resume_recommended: False
- recovery.operator_action: rollback-or-fix
- next_step: 真实 apply 已落盘，但 nginx 测试失败；建议先运行 repair dry-run 做保守诊断，再决定 selective rollback 还是人工修复。
[doctor] repair result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-current-apply-attention/REPAIR-RESULT.json
- mode: dry-run
- final_status: ok
- source_recovery.installer_status: needs-attention
- source_recovery.resume_recommended: False
- source_recovery.operator_action: rollback-or-fix
- execution.nginx_test_rerun_status: not-run
- next_step: 当前仅保留中性 repair companion，用于覆盖结果契约集合；当前排障仍应优先查看 APPLY-RESULT 与 nginx test 输出。
[doctor] rollback result json
- path: __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-current-apply-attention/ROLLBACK-RESULT.json
- mode: dry-run
- final_status: ok
- flags.execute: False
- next_step: 当前仅记录 rollback 占位结果；真正下一步仍应先查看 APPLY-RESULT。
[doctor] journal
- entries: 3
- last_event: run.complete [needs-attention]
- last_message: installer completed with attention required
[doctor] 下一步建议
- 真实 apply 已落盘，但 nginx 测试失败；建议先运行 ./repair-applied-package.sh --result-json __FIXTURE_ROOT__/artifacts/fixture-current-apply-attention/APPLY-RESULT.json --dry-run 做保守诊断，再决定 selective rollback 还是人工修复。 当前不建议把 resume 当作默认下一步。
- 输入快照可用于 resume：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/runs/fixture-current-apply-attention/inputs.env
